reportSummary: Every attempted navigation (Trending, Politics) immediately hit a Cloudflare “Just a moment…” interstitial, and no Nairaland content ever became visible. The run is blocked/inconclusive due to anti-bot verification, so primary and secondary navigation could not be validated. Clicks did change URL/title, but repeated waits showed no progress or way to proceed. An accessibility scan flagged a critical meta-refresh issue on the interstitial page.
